mnemonics.title: SCLI Components
mnemonics.content: System Calls, Libraries, Interface - The three core components of API implementation in OS

mnemonics.title: PER Sequence
mnemonics.content: Parameters → Execute → Return: The sequence when making system calls through API

mnemonics.title: API CRUD
mnemonics.content: Create, Read, Update, Delete - Fundamental operations APIs enable for resource management

mnemonics.title: API Layers
mnemonics.content: Application (user programs), Program (API functions), Interface (OS kernel) - The three-tier structure

acronyms.usage: Core concept for OS interaction methods

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a suspension bridge connecting Application Island to OS Mainland with API pillars
Visualize data packets moving through API tunnel: User Space → Kernel Space → Back with results
Picture a layered cake: User Apps (top), API (middle), OS Kernel (bottom)
See API as a traffic controller directing CPU, memory, and I/O vehicles

analogies.analogy: Like a restaurant menu - programs 'order' services without knowing kitchen (OS) details
Similar to bank tellers - controlled interface to access secure resources (vault/OS kernel)
Like a car dashboard - simple controls (API) hide complex engine mechanics (OS)
